M0750_CU_HOUSEKEEP (M0750) Current Housekeeping Current ability to safely and effectively perform light housekeeping and heavier cleaning tasks. 00 = (a) Able to independently perform all housekeeping tasks; OR (b) Physically, cognitively, and mentally able to perform all housekeeping tasks but has not routinely participated in housekeeping tasks in the past (i.e., prior to this home care admission).
01 = Able to perform only light housekeeping (e.g., dusting, wiping
